summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SOMA-ID backend APIs and frontend UI. All 11 backend tests passed including image generation with Gemini Nano Banana. Frontend Auth page and i18n system working correctly.

minor.issue: google.generativeai package is deprecated - warning shown in logs. Should migrate to google.genai package.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 404 errors for Supabase tables (modules, materials) - using local mock data. Not critical but indicates incomplete database setup.

issues: Warning banner about 'MODO DE FALLBACK ATIVADO' is displayed - Google Apps Script URL not configured

action_items: Consider migrating from deprecated google.generativeai to google.genai package
Configure Google Apps Script URL to remove fallback mode warning (optional)
Run Supabase SQL seed to populate modules and materials tables (optional - app works with mock data)
critical_code_review_comments: Image generation endpoint /api/gemini/generate-image is working correctly with Gemini Nano Banana via emergentintegrations
AuthPage.tsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
TranslationContext.tsx has complete translations for PT, EN, ES languages
All API endpoints return proper JSON responses with status field

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Auth page, language switching, dashboard all working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_pytest_client status check entry during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API tests are in /app/tests/test_soma_api.py. All Gemini endpoints tested including image generation. Frontend uses TranslationContext for i18n with PT/EN/ES support. Auth page has data-testid attributes. Dashboard shows existing project 'Não identificado' in APROVACAO_VISUAL status.
